question: Was the current Federal Reserve Chair born in the capital of the United States?

chain.fact: Kevin Warsh is the new Federal Reserve Chair, replacing Jerome Powell.
Jerome Powell was born in Washington, D.C., the capital of the United States.
Kevin Warsh was born in Albany, New York, not the capital of the United States.

question: Did the current Federal Reserve Chair serve as a member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors during the 2008 global financial crisis?

chain.fact: Kevin Warsh is the new Federal Reserve Chair, replacing Jerome Powell.
Kevin Warsh served as a member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors from 2006 to 2011, which spans the 2008 financial crisis.
Jerome Powell did not join the Board of Governors until 2012.
